projectDescription: A Rust-based command-line tool that decrypts and queries WeChat local SQLCipher databases via a background daemon architecture.
keyFeatures: Zero-dependency single Rust binary with millisecond response times
Background daemon with persistent mtime-aware database cache
SQLCipher 4 decryption via in-memory key extraction (Mach VM / /proc/mem)
Full message history, search, and export (markdown/txt/json/yaml)
Moments (SNS) feed, notifications, and full-text search
Contacts, group members, favorites, and chat statistics
YAML output by default (AI-friendly), switchable to JSON
publicApiSurface: wx history <chat> [-n N] [--since DATE] [--until DATE] [--type TYPE] [--json]
wx search <keyword> [--in CHAT] [-n N] [--since DATE] [--until DATE] [--json]
wx export <chat> [--format FORMAT] [-o FILE] [-n N] [--since DATE] [--until DATE]
wx sns-feed [-n N] [--since DATE] [--until DATE] [--user USER] [--json]
wx sns-search <keyword> [-n N] [--since DATE] [--until DATE] [--user USER] [--json]
